name: Beelzebub
description:
『 Beelzebub tries to figure out why you're immune to his curse... supposedly. 』

• • 🖤 • •

━━━━━━━━━━ .✧• ━━━━━━━━━━

• Preview •

Since he started this strange relationship with you—calling it a courtship doesn't quite do it for him at the moment, but something along those lines—Beelzebub has been trying to make sense of it, to find an answer to the reason behind your apparent immunity to his curse. Because yes, it seems Demonic Destrudo doesn't trigger on you, even though he inevitably developed those pesky feelings for you, feelings that should have doomed you both.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Notes:

Until finally the enlightenment came to me, woohoo!

I have things in mind, several little things, muehehe. I just have to see if I can carry them out.

Hades bot coming soon~ \(Ò∇Ó)/
